verses.text: Tua ni ciangin Topa in a sak mahmah, a lian mahmah, a to mahmah namsau tawh, a taikhia gulpi ahi awle, a kikualvial gulpi ahi awle gim pia ding a, amah in tuipi sunga om tua gulpi a that ding hi
Tua ni ciangin, “A deihhuai leenggah lo thu la-in sa un
Keimah, Topa, tua lo a hongpa ka hi a, a hunhunin tui ka buak hi. Khatpeuh in a suksiat lohna dingin sun leh zanin ka hong ding hi
Leenggui lo tungah ka heh nawn kei hi. Ling leh lingkungte hong om leh keimah kuankhia-in tuate ka haltum ding hi
Tua ahih kei leh keima hutna sungah amaute hong om hen la, amaute in kei tawh kilemna hong bawlin keimah tawh amaute hong kilem ta uh hen,” Topa in ci ding hi
Hong tung ding hunah Jakob in zung kha ding a, Israel palhin dawnkhia ding a, leitung khempeuh a gah tawh kidimsak ding hi
Pasian in Israel-te' galte a vatgawp bangin Israel-te vatgawp ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh amau a thatte a kithah bangin Israel-te kithat ahi hiam
A kithukkim dingin amaute sal suahsakna tawh gim a pia hi. Nisuahna huihpi in a mutkhiat bangin amaute a khinkhia hi

Israel in suang tawh a kibawl biakna tau khempeuh suangkang satvui a batsak ciangin Asherah milimte leh paknamtui taute a dinglai om nawnlo hi. Hih thu hangin Jakob' mawhna kimaisakin a mawhna kilakkhiatsak hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a muan'huai khuapi pen gamlak bangin amah guakin omin, mi' ten'na mun pen kitaisanin kinusia hi. Tua lai-ah bawngno gamta-in lum a, singhiangte a kheuh hi

A hiangte a keu ciangin kitan hi. Nupite hong pai-in mei-in cih uh hi. Hih mite in khentel theihna neilo ahih ciangin amaute a bawlpa in amaute hehpihlo ding a, amaute a piangsakpa in amaute tungah maipha laklo ding hi
Israel mite aw, tua ni ciangin Eufratis gunpi panin Egypt luipi dongin Topa in thu hong khen ding a, note khat khatin hong kikaikhawm ding hi
Tua ni ciangin peengkul lianpi khat kitum ding a, Assiria gamsunga a mangthang mite leh Egypt gamsunga a kihawlkhia mite hong pai-in Jerusalem mual siangtho tungah Topa hong bia ding uh hi.
